programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 4
programme.desc: After impressing the judges in yesterday's round robin relay challenge, the winning team are back in the kitchen cooking for immunity and a chance to be safe from the next elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Every contestant is up for elimination, except the winner of Thursday's immunity challenge.The pressure mounts for all contestants to deliver delicious dishes and keep their place in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Today the contestants compete in the ultimate BBQ challenge, cooking for a staggering 1200 people.The team who least impresses, will find themselves cooking in tomorrow's pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 7
programme.desc: In the first pressure test of the season contestants must cook three dishes from Judge Jock Zonfrillo's three-hatted, award-winning restaurant, Orana. The least impressive dish will send someone home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 8
programme.desc: It's the first mystery box challenge of the season and it's a tough one! The remaining contestants discover the ingredients have been chosen from all corners of the globe, by judge Melissa Leong.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The five contestants with the most impressive dishes from yesterday's challenge find themselves back in the kitchen ready to cook off in an immunity challenge. Plus, MasterClass with Andy and Jock.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 10
programme.desc: In today's elimination challenge, every contestant bar one, the winner of the immunity challenge, is up for elimination. The contestant with the least impressive dish will be going home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Filmed live in front of MasterChef superfans, the contestants are split into three teams of seven and compete in a three-round cook-off. The bottom six contestants will be in tomorrow's pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It's a pressure test with a difference. Each contestant has written their own pressure test recipe and has to create a dish to wow the judges. The least impressive dish will send its maker home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The judges reveal that each contestant's mystery box, contains four ingredients which they can barter with one another for. The top four dishes will see their makers cook for immunity tomorrow.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Today's immunity challenge sees four contestants compete in a MasterChef time auction. The more time they spend on buying ingredients, the less time they have to cook.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Today's challenge is all about texture. In round one contestants must cook a dish with the best crunch. Round two is all about a gooey texture. The least impressive gooey dish will send its chef home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The MasterChef contestants leave the kitchen for a week of off-site challenges. Teams must make two entrees and three mains for 50 diners. The least impressive team faces a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Helly Raichura, of secret dining venue Enter Via Laundry, sets tonight's taste test. Contestants who guess the least ingredients correctly must replicate the dish in an elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Today's ingredients are sourced by locals who grow fruit and vegetables in their back yards.The three most impressive dishes from today's mystery box challenge will cook in an immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Three contestants are told they must prepare 100 small plates each, consisting of five different dishes. Dishes are then colour-coded and served to the judges on a sushi train in this blind tasting.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 20
programme.desc: In today's take-away elimination challenge contestants must make a dish that will stand the home delivery test. Contestants have 90 minutes from the start of the cook to completed delivery.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Contestants learn that there will be a twist with every challenge this week, so they must think on their feet to survive another week in the MasterChef kitchen. Tonight two twists really stir the pot.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: The situation gets out of control when Mike has girls back to the house. Snooki fights again, and Ronnie gets into a brawl of his own, leaving Sammi questioning their relationship. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 107
programme.desc: The roommates head to Atlantic City where fun turns to fury when Mike manages to antagonise both Snooki and JWOWW. And one roommate reveals that she used to have an eating disorder. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: The summer's winding down, but the drama doesn't stop. Pauly's got a stalker and a fight lands another roommate in jail. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Ronnie's released from his night in jail. Snooki's upset after a run in with an ex. The housemates wrap things up at the Shore, but not before one final hot tub hook up. (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 111
programme.desc: Questions are answered when Snooki, The Situation, JWOWW, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi and Vinny return for more fights and insights into what happened down at the Jersey Shore. (S1, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 112
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: The Jersey Shore crew is headed to Miami! They are shocked by the surprise arrival of former housemate, Angelina, and the drama picks up right where it left off at the seaside. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Sammi tries to figure out what Ronnie really did at the club the night before. When Angelina interrupts Pauly's game, we see a whole new side of the usually calm Pauly D. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: Angelina apologises to the girls. But back at the house, Mike, Vinny and Pauly have a close encounter with grenades in the hot tub, while Ron continues to creep behind Sammi's back. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Ron's bad behaviour puts Snooki, Angelina and JWOWW in a tough spot. Together the girls decide to write an 'anonymous' letter to Sammi and finally reveal the entire truth. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: Sammi finds Snooki and Jenni's 'anonymous' letter, and this time it's really over with Ronnie. Mike, Vinny and Pauly ('MVP') have their hands full, juggling four girls in one night! (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: The anonymous note causes tension between the girls, culminating in a full-blown cat-fight. And after sharing a night in bed with Vinny, Snooki reveals a not-so-little known fact. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: The roommates deal with the aftermath of the fight. Angelina starts dating Jose, a guy from the club; Jenni and Snooki clean up the smush room in preparation for Snooki's hook-up. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: When news gets out that Angelina and Vinny hooked up, Mike threatens to spill the beans to Jose. Vinny and Pauly find the girls of their dreams, but one of them will be heartbroken. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 209
programme.desc: Things go south for Angelina when the house learns that she slept with Jose after smushing Vinnie, but trouble really ensues when she gets too close to a guy Snooki hooked up with. (S2, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 210
programme.desc: Mike reunites with his Canadian hottie, providing entertainment for the whole house. But when Angelina tells her roommates how she really feels, she pushes Snooki into a frenzy. (S2, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 211
programme.desc: With Angelina gone, Snooki thinks it's time that she and Jenni bury the hatchet with Sam but Snooki's happiness is short-lived as Mark becomes increasingly belligerent with her. (S2, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 212
programme.desc: Everyone is frustrated with Mike's poor game after he gets them kicked out of a club, gets the car towed, nearly burns down the house and fails as a wingman for Pauly D - twice! (S2, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: Pauly D and Vinnie have final dates with their Miami girls, and Sam and Ronnie can't stop fighting. Meanwhile, Jenni stirs things up between the boys, leading to a dramatic final night. (S2, ep13)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 214
programme.desc: The cast is back together to dish the dirt on Miami - from bromances and romances, to the infamous note and the fights that followed! (S2, ep14)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: Leftover tension from Miami spills over to Seaside when unresolved issues among the girls explode on the first night. And new roommate Deena gets naked in front of The Situation! Series 3, Episode 1.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: The first night's fight causes tension in the house. Ronnie & Sammi keep isolating themselves, but things really explode when Ronnie decides to chill with the other housemates. Series 3, Episode 2.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Sammi decides to make peace with Snooki and Deena. JWOWW runs into her old flame Roger and sparks fly. Meanwhile, Snooki gets arrested for public intoxication. Series 3, Episode 3.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: After Snooki is arrested, she becomes depressed... until she meets a new guy. Denna meets Ronnie's stunt double. Meanwhile, JWOWW's relationship with Tom comes to a dramatic end. Series 3, Episode 4.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Ronnie and JWOWW make up, leading to Sammi punching Ronnie in the face. Vinny picks up a girl with an overbearing family, and The Situation learns Deena's dirty little secret. Series 3, Episode 5.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Ronnie's over-drinking causes some painful side effects, Snooki meets a guy who may or may not be engaged, and Pauly D makes peace with an old nemesis. Series 3, Episode 6.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: Ronnie and Sammi's tumultuous relationship finally comes to an end, but when Ronnie destroys everything Sammi owns, she must decide whether or not to leave the Shore. Series 3, Episode 7.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: Ronnie feels like he has no friends left at the Shore after Sammi leaves & the housemates aren't sympathetic to him. Meanwhile, Mike tries to hook up with Pauly's ex-girlfriend! Series 3, Episode 8.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 309
programme.desc: Snooki's summer of hookups comes back to haunt her, and Mike pulls a big prank on Deena & Snooki... but the rest of the guys have the last laugh, leaving for dinner without him. Series 3, Episode 9.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 51
programme.desc: In 2003, Jeanne Callahan waited for her husband, Stephen Trantel, to return home from a day of fishing. Hours later, she received a call telling her that Stephen was under arrest -- police told Jeanne that Stephen had committed ten bank robberies.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 57
programme.desc: A report about Charla and Darren Mack, a married, childless couple who were swingers who liked to attend group sex parties. After their daughter Erika was born, Charla was no longer interested in swinging and their marriage began to crumble.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 43
programme.desc: A report on the 1993 murder of Dr. Linda Goudey in Stoneham, Massachusetts. At the time she was dating Dr. Timothy Stryker, who depending on whom you believe, is either a calculating murderer or an innocent man.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 58
programme.desc: A report about Charla and Darren Mack, a married, childless couple who were swingers who liked to attend group sex parties. After their daughter Erika was born, Charla was no longer interested in swinging and their marriage began to crumble.

programme.title: 48 Hours S21 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A report on the cold cases of two young women, both new to the areas where they lived, who were both raped and murdered.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 49
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 26
programme.desc: In July 2008, Michael Roseboro called 911 to report that he had just found the body of his wife, Jan, at the bottom of their pool. An autopsy revealed that she had been strangled, beaten and then drowned: her death was ruled a homicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 22
programme.desc: It was February 2002 when Cynthia Sommer, her husband, Marine Sgt. Todd Sommer, and their four children were coming home from a family weekend at an amusement park.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 60
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 61
programme.desc: 10-year-old Krystal Surles and her friend Kaylene Harris were attacked in Kaylene’s home by an intruder who slashed both girls’ throats. Kaylene died. Krystal not only survived but was able to help police, leading to the arrest of her attacker.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 52
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 56
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 4
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 58
programme.desc: On April 14, 2009, model and masseuse Julissa Brisman was found murdered in a Boston hotel. A police investigation revealed that Brisman and two other female victims of assault had been contacted through ads they had placed on the website Craigslist.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 43
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 57
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 38
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 41
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 36
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S22 Ep. 42
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 45
programme.desc: In 2006, 31-year-old Leisha Hurst, while attending Barstow College, began dating fellow student, 34-year-old Jeami Chiapulis. Chiapulis seemed to be the man she could settle down with. The couple had plans to marry when Hurst vanished on January 22, 2009.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 37
programme.desc: In April 2006, Andrew Kissel, a real estate mogul who had embezzled more than $40 million, was found tied up and stabbed to death in the basement of his Greenwich, Connecticut mansion, just days before he was to plead guilty for his crimes.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 21
programme.desc: A report on the November 1994 murder of Farah Fratta, whose body was discovered in the garage of her Humble, Texas home. She had been shot twice in the head.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 2358
programme.desc: A report on the separate disappearances in 2003 of three young women, and the investigations which not only eventually discovered the one individual who had known all three women, but led to his conviction as the killer of the three.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A report on the February 2009 disappearance of Amber Dubois, just blocks from Escondido High School in California. 48 HOURS examines the permanent impact her disappearance has had on her family, even after the discovery and conviction of the murderer.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 50
programme.desc: A report about how serial killer Andrew Urdiales was identified, arrested and convicted, and about the young woman who became the only one of his victims to survive.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 44
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours S23 Ep. 62
programme.desc: A report on the 1980 murder of Marilyn McIntyre, who was found dead in her home. Her husband, Lane, had returned home from work that morning and found her body. As police checked into his alibi, he named his friend Curt Forbes as a potential suspect.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 813
programme.desc: Cartman's Incredible Gift: Cartman jumps off his roof while wearing cardboard wings and ends up in a coma. When he awakens he believes he has psychic powers - and the police believe it too! (S8, E13)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: Woodland Critter Christmas: Stan finds talking animals building a Christmas tree in the woods. They enlist him to protect them from an evil mountain lion but things aren't what they seem. (S8, E14)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The boys set up a talent agency and pool all their resources and impress their first client only to have another agency steal him away.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After the sudden on-set of the disease Gingervitis, Cartman rallies all other ginger kids to rise up and assume their role as the master race.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The boys try to rescue their new friend Willzyx, a talking space whale, from the Denver Sea Park, and with the help of MASA (Mexican Aeronautica y Spacia Administracion) get him home to the moon for $200.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Stan is embarrassed when his dad gets pulled over for drunk driving. Randy believes that only one thing can save him from his 'disease,' a bleeding statue of the Virgin Mary in the next town.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 901
programme.desc: Mr Garrison's Fancy New Vagina: Mr Garrison has a sex change, Kyle has an unusual operation to make him tall and athletic enough to play basketball and Kyle's dad has "dolphinoplasty"!?! (S9, E01)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 904
programme.desc: Best Friends Forever: Kenny is in a coma. Cartman wants life-support turned off so he can get his PSP. But Kenny's spirit is leading the armies of heaven against the demons of hell! (S9, E04)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 905
programme.desc: The Losing Edge: The boys are bored of playing baseball, and concoct a plan to lose the big play-off game. Randy trains hard to become the biggest drunken jackass at each match. (S9, E05)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Death of Eric Cartman: Everyone decides to ignore Cartman! He is convinced he is dead and must find peace by making amends for his past sins. Will Butters' 'psychic ability' help him? (S9, E06)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 907
programme.desc: Erection Day: Jimmy's noticed that one of his body parts has a mind of his own, so he tries to control his raging hormones in time to perform his comedy routine at the School Talent Show. (S9, E07)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 908
programme.desc: Two Days Before The Day After Tomorrow: Stan and Cartman crash a speed boat into the world's largest beaver dam, flooding the town of Beaverton. Everyone's response is that of mass hysteria! (S9, E08)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 909
programme.desc: Marjorine: Cartman is convinced that the girls have a device which can see into the future. The boys come up with a plan to take it. Unfortunately for Butters he's a major part of the plan. (S9, E09)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 910
programme.desc: Follow That Egg: In a bid to prevent Mr. Slave from marrying Big Gay Al, Mrs. Garrison forces the children to help him in an experiment to prove that gay marriages are unstable. (S9. E10)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 913
programme.desc: Free Willzyx: The boys are tricked into believing the killer whale at Sea Park is from the moon. How will Timmy's wheelchair, the Russian government and their skateboards help to free him? (S9, E13)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 914
programme.desc: Bloody Mary: Randy is arrested for drunk driving and must attend AA, where he is told he is powerless to control himself. Maybe the bleeding Virgin Mary statue can perform a miracle or two? (S9, E14)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Towelie gets over his drug addiction and writes his memoirs. With Oprah's support, his book becomes a best seller and his story inspires millions to turn their lives around.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1001
programme.desc: The Return of Chef: The boys notice that Chef is acting weird after returning from the 'The Super Adventure Club'. Why is he trying to seduce them? Can a trip to a strip joint help? (S10, E01)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1006
programme.desc: ManBearPig: Ex U.S. Vice President Al Gore visits South Park Elementary and warns the pupils about ManBearPig, a monster which is "half man, half bear and half pig" - you can't be "cereal"! (S10, E06)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1007
programme.desc: Tsst: Cartman's mum realizes she can no longer control him, so attempts to get help from various reality TV experts. Only when she recruits the "Dog Whisperer" do results start to happen. (S10, E07)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1008
programme.desc: Make Love, Not Warcraft: The boys are all shades of mad when a 'griefer' repeatedly kills them in an online game. Some serious training is in order so they can defeat him and play the game! (S10, E08)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1010
programme.desc: Miss Teacher Bangs A Boy: Power goes to Cartman's head when he becomes "Dawg the Hallway Monitor". Meanwhile, Kyle is shocked to discover his little brother Ike and his teacher are at "it"! (S10, E10)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1011
programme.desc: Hell On Earth 2006: Satan has a Sweet 16 style party in L.A. on Halloween! The gang perform a ritual and manage to summon Biggie Smalls - who demands Butters helps him get to the party! (S10, E11)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1013
programme.desc: Go God Go XII: Cartman is stuck in the future, caught up in a battle between atheists and sea otters! And what will become of Richard Dawkins and Mrs. Garrison's love affair? (S10, E13)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1014
programme.desc: Stanley's Cup: In a parody of underdog sports films, Stan is sentenced to community service and ends up coaching the Park County Pee-Wee hockey team - can he turn these losers into winners? (S10, E14)

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After failing to show respect for their teacher, PC Principal revokes Pyjama Day privileges for the entire 4th grade class on the most important day of the year.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Stan is horrified to realise that he's misinterpreted some of the greatest writing of all time and dedicates himself to curing his unconscious bias by reading The Lord of the Rings.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Cartman is furious with his mom when she tells him about her new job.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 4
programme.desc: With world tensions escalating, a lot is riding on Butterâ€™s ability to crush the Russian competition in the all-important Under 10s Dressage Championship.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The boys find out that the joys of playing Airsoft come with the challenges of dealing with teenagers.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Butters is shocked to learn that people in South Park don't understand what St. Patrick's Day is really about.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Cartman Gets An Anal Probe: Cartman dreams he has a close encounter with an alien. The other boys are convinced the dream was real, and that he has been the victim of an alien anal probe. (S1, E01)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Cartman's environmental essay wins a national contest, America's sweetheart, Kathie Lee Gifford, comes to South Park to present the award.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A weekend trip to experience the finer points of camping, fishing and blowing animals to smithereens is threatened by an erupting volcano.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: An Elephant Makes Love To A Pig: Kyle calls in genetic engineer Dr. Mephisto to crossbreed his pet elephant and Cartman's pot-bellied pig in a bid to win a science competition. (S1, E05)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Death: Stan's ancient grandfather attempts to trick the boys into killing him. Meanwhile, the parents of South Park lobby a TV network to rid the airwaves of Terrance and Phillip. (S1, E06)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A mishap at the morgue transforms the residents of South Park into brain-eating zombies and threatens the boys night of Trick-or-Treating.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Thanksgiving Episode- Mistaking Cartman for a starving African child, government authorities send him to Ethiopia where he runs into Sally Struthers.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mr Hankey, The Christmas Poo: The Mayor decides to impose a holiday theme which won't offend anybody. Kyle tries to convince everyone that Mr Hankey (a singing Christmas poo) exists. (S1, E09)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Damien: The new kid in class persuades Jesus to do battle with his father, Satan, in the final battle of good versus evil. Cartman is livid to learn the bout clashes with his birthday. (S1, E10)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Tom's Rhinoplasty: The boys become lesbians to impress a new teacher, making Wendy jealous. Also, to his delight, Mr. Garrison's plastic surgery leaves him looking like David Hasselhoff. (S1, E11)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Mecha-Streisand: Cartman and Kyle fall out over a magic triangle they un-earth on an archaeological dig. The triangle yields the power to turn Barbra Streisand into a terrible monster. (S1, E12)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is A Dirty S**t (1): Dr. Mephisto helps Cartman un-cover the truth about his dad's identity. The spotlight is on quite a few of South Park's male residents. Who could it be? (S1, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is Still A Dirty S**t (2): Dr Mephisto is shot before he reveals who Cartman's father is. Who exactly shot him? Meanwhile, the rest of the town try to deal with a blizzard. (S2, E02)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Barbrady resigns, anarchy ensues and the boys pitch in to help.

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ike's Wee Wee: Kyle misunderstands what circumcision is and thinks he has to save Ike's penis from being cut off! Mr. Mackey is fired, and turns to drugs - "drugs are bad, m'kay?" (S2, E04)

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 824
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass' Dave England shows Rob, Chanel, and Sterling what it takes to inspire a generation of "Poo Pros," gets careless with some "Bad Daddies" and the agony of getting "Butt Hurt."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo enter the SNACK ZONE, learn the dangers of hiring BUDGET BABYSITTERS and root on reckless golf cart drivers in COUNTRY CLUB DRIFT.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 718
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, motocross champion Ryan Villopoto joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to learn when it's "Time To Retire," start some "Workplace Throwdowns"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 26
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness the 80's are back with Rockdiculousness! Steel Panther joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to fire up the FLAME FUEL, grab some COMMUNITY PROPERTY and tempt death with LIVIN' ON A PRAYER.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 817
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling are joined by the coolest granny in the game, Baddie Winkle, who teaches us how to stay young in "Fountain of Baddie,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 3
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo witness WORLD WAR BEE, diagnose a medical condition known as BACKFLIP BLOCK, and avoid stray tires in THE WHEEL WORLD.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 813
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, NASCAR's Bubba Wallace sits with Rob, Stee-lo and Chanel to drive fast and hard in "Trading Paint," play some "Next Level Games" and get into some road rage throwdowns in "Street Heat."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 827
programme.desc: Tonight on an all-new Ridiculousness, the legendary television host Jerry Springer joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to chant "Jerry! Jerry! Jerry!", watch some "Beastdowns" and post some photos on "Injurgram."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 701
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, 50 Cent joins Rob, Stee-Lo, and Chanel to discuss his "Crappy Birthday," people who are "Built Like 50," and others who, like 50, are real "Show Stealers."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 708
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, model and actress Charlotte Mckinney joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to tell some "Dirty Secrets", taste some "All Natural Beef" and clench for the category "Spike My Butt"."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: Tonight on an all new Ridiculousness, the crew is joined by multi-platinum singer/songwriter Leona Lewis to watch some of her fellow "Aisle Trolls", be misunderstood while "Speaking Leonese"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 7
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, it's all about the kids! Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the next generation by drinking some GO GO JUICE, getting caught up in TINY TORNADOS, and joining TYKE CLUB.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 23
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, reality star Tami Roman joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to talk about her extreme case of RATNAPHOBIA, what it means to be STREET DUMB, and about living with BUTT REGRET.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo check out the fierce LAWN WARRIORS, learn some wisdom in SPEAK YOUR MIND and witness some FURRY FURY.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 12
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the greatest form of precipitation, Rob, Steelo and Chanel pay a visit to the CUL-DE-SLOPES, watch some ICE CARPADES, and find evidence of the elusive SNOW SCORPIONS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 711
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling dodge some "No Look Slaps," hit the "Sensi-Button," and experience the drama of "The Circle Of Life."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 822
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel pay homage to some "Legendary Assists," bust up some public makeouts with "PDA Police," and find out why babies are nothing more than "Tiny People, Tiny Brains."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 715
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, American Idol Winner, Jordin Sparks, joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to get "Wet And Afraid," watch some dogs go "Nuts About Balls" and learn it's hard to breathe with "No Air."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling discuss a condition called "Temporary Fansanity", people who are "Quick To Cry" and our favorite summer sporting event, the "Bro Games".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 728
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling check out some hard-working monkeys in "Bananas Ain't Free," throw down in "Stripe Club" and dress up nice for some "Formal Slams."

programme.desc: Commander Blake is assigned to investigate the bludgeoning death of an elderly woman as quickly and quietly as possible while DCI James' wife Zoe goes into labor.

programme.title: The Commander S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Brian believes that someone else was in the room with him when he found his mother's body. Commander Blake is forced to take extreme action to find the truth and accept the repercussions. Will they find the abductor of DCI James' baby?

programme.title: The Commander S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Did Brian kill his own mother in an alcoholic haze? Who stole DCI James and Zoe's baby? Clare feels the heat of two high-profile cases with personal connections.

programme.title: The Commander S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Patient and persistent, Deputy Chief Constable Stephen Blackton (David O'Hara) has earned his nickname, "Blackdog,” as he is called in to re-open the investigation of the Lionel Cripps shooting.

programme.title: The Commander S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Graham Warner, the officer implicated in the Lionel Cripps shooting, is found dead in a park. Commander Blake continues to bury evidence of her relationship with James Lampton.

programme.title: The Commander S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Graham Warner, the officer implicated in the Lionel Cripps shooting, is found dead in a park. Commander Blake continues to bury evidence of her relationship with James Lampton.

programme.title: The Commander S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Dutch DI Count Eric Van Hauten offers to help DCI Hedges with a new murder case. Commander Blake pledges to remain uninvolved, but will she be able to as the threat of more victims increases?

programme.title: The Commander S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Newly promoted, Commander Clare Blake (Amanda Burton) vows no cover-ups. When a previously convicted killer, James Lampton (Hugh Bonneville), gets released on parole, Blake's judgement is put to the test.

programme.title: The Commander S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: DCI Mike Hedges (Matthew Marsh) conceals evidence of his involvement in the police shooting of an unarmed civilian, Lionel Cripps.

programme.title: The Commander S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Commander Blake clashes with the drug squad and the preserved body of a two-year-old child found at an abandoned mental hospital remains a mystery. Blake is accused of having blood on her hands.

programme.title: The Commander S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Commander Blake and DCI Doug James pursue two former patients as suspects in the case, Eric Thornton and John Littlewood. DCI James remains skeptical about the direction of the investigation.

programme.title: The Commander S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When self-made millionaire Donald Griffith is found dead in his swimming pool, it seems like justice.

programme.title: The Commander S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Commander Blake learns that Griffith's wife and mistresses all stand to benefit if his death was not a suicide.

programme.title: The Commander S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: After a popular priest is stabbed 29 times in his church, Commander Blake interrupts her holiday to investigate the murder.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 74
programme.desc: Sandy steals some painkillers for Bea, and Lizzie decides what to do about Gordon.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 75
programme.desc: Meg learns about Lizzie's house burning down, and Doreen keeps out of Sandy's way.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 76
programme.desc: Lizzie returns to Wentworth as a remand prisoner, and Judy gets a shock.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 77
programme.desc: The women decide to discredit Officer Powell.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 78
programme.desc: Doreen visits Bea to try to find out how crucial it is that she gets a new kidney.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 79
programme.desc: Dr Kennedy visits Bea and confirms that Doreen has agreed to donate her kidney.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 80
programme.desc: The women become determined to disrupt the harsh security measures that plague them.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 81
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Grace has suspicions about the murder that Kate was sentenced for.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: New prisoners Karen and Lynn are admitted to Wentworth Detention Centre.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Franky siezes the chance to take over and announces she is now in charge.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With Franky's hold growing, temperatures reach boiling point in an all-out riot.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Rosie gives birth to a boy, and Eddie tells Marilyn he saw who stabbed Bill.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Frankie and Bea fight during a dance class, and Yates is caught smuggling for Marilyn.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lynn reveals she was raped by Mr Bentley, and Vera has trouble with her ailing mother.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lizzie finds a stray cat in the garden and brings it into the prison.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bea Smith and the other inmates find out about Franky's plans to get paroled.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Marilyn's boyfriend Eddie is suspicious of where she got the money for his birthday gift.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Vera's drinking gets her in trouble, and Helen Masters cons everyone to win her acquittal.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The Governor introduces a volleyball program to let the inmates work off their tension.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Karen talks Franky down from the roof and offers to teach her how to read.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: As news of an escape spreads, Vera attempts to tighten security.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The payroll robbery goes disastrously wrong. Lynn goes into labour.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Doreen and Franky masquerade as nuns to con people into giving them money.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Meg and Karen find Lynn on the floor of her cell, bleeding.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Lynn is rushed to hospital after her suicide attempt.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Barbara has drugs smuggled into the prison.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Bea is furious to learn from Vera that Barbara is inside for smuggling drugs.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 27
programme.desc: David Gurney wakes up to find that no one - his wife, his co-workers, his best friend, not even his own mother knows him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 28
programme.desc: An astronaut declares himself a god when his ship lands on a planet populated by people smaller than ants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Oliver Crangle is a bitter, prejudiced man. Through unknown means, he intends to shrink every evil person in the world at four o'clock.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 30
programme.desc: A loud-mouthed braggart's boasts attract the attention of some aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 31
programme.desc: An elderly couple visit the New Life Corporation, hoping to transport their personalities into youthful artificial bodies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 32
programme.desc: An alien who crash-lands into a remote mountain village stirs up the villagers' fears and animosity, but he befriends a little boy and gives him a mysterious present.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 33
programme.desc: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy, Willie, is alive and evil. He makes plans for a new act with a new dummy: plans that Willie doesn't support!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 34
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple briefly returns to the groom's childhood home, the ties of the past prove too strong to resist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 35
programme.desc: A widower buys a robot grandmother for his three children.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 36
programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 37
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, had an impact on their lives.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A scientist creates an android that has the qualities which he feels he's lacking.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A US naval destroyer investigates a mysterious tapping sound coming from a sunken submarine.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A 12-year-old girl who lost her parents in a fire doesn't speak because she has grown up in a secret telepathic community.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jess-Belle enlists the aid of a local witch who casts a spell that makes Billy-Ben fall in love with her.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A three-man spacecraft lands on a planet only to discover the wreckage of a spacecraft identical to their own.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A reporter finds himself trapped in a small town where the people have extraordinary powers.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Vollmer, a small-time neo-Nazi, takes advice from a shadowy benefactor on how to increase his followers.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A lonely man falls in love with a mini museum doll, which he believes is alive.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: A man makes a deal with the devil to ensure the success of his newspaper.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: A man travels back in time to try to prevent some of history's catastrophes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: An astronaut arrives back on Earth, then notices things have changed in his absence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A man considers several possibilities when offered one wish by a genie.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The curator of a murderers' row in a soon-to-be-defunct wax museum persuades the owner to let him keep the figures for awhile.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: A bored, wealthy businessman gets a chance to go back in time and start over, armed with all the knowledge he's acquired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Toy designer Horace Ford spends most of his time reminiscing about his idyllic childhood. But when he gets a chance to go back to those years he gets a bitter taste of reality.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: A man named Benteen leads a colony of Americans stranded on a desert planet for 30 years.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: A young couple book passage on a trans-Atlantic cruise, hoping to salvage their marriage.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: An untalented would-be writer's career takes off when the ghost of William Shakespeare writes his script.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 20
programme.desc: A sultry but sinister pharmaceutical rep is dead set on winning the heart of the hospital's chief of staff.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 21
programme.desc: A beach boy involved with a gang member's sister is a suspect in his murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 22
programme.desc: A surgeon (Wayne Rogers) drops dead while he's operating on another doctor (Jack Klugman).

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 23
programme.desc: A pilot of an airliner carrying Dr. Sloan and Amanda to a medical conference in Europe is murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 24
programme.desc: A wealthy woman and her lover concoct an elaborate scheme to do in her husband.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 25
programme.desc: A comedian (Tim Conway) makes a bumbling attempt to do in his more successful former partner (Harvey Korman)---whose wife turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 26
programme.desc: A mad bomber whom Dr. Sloan helped put away has escaped and wants the good doctor blown away.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Steve becomes embroiled in political intrigue after the murder of a city councilman's wife appears to be part of a larger political strategy.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mark investigates when her older lover, a new state Supreme Court Justice, murders a teenage girl.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A Malibu Hills fire is the backdrop for rising tensions between the residents; a disgraced stockbroker, a naturalist, a worried father, and a land developer. A worried Dr. Sloan deals with his own parental fears when Steve helps fight the fire.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Community General is already under increased security, with a high-profile criminal hospitalized, when an important businesswoman is brought in. Mark suspects her security guard has deadly intentions.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Jesse's new part-time job as a trainer of the pro basketball Mustangs turns deadly when he's accused of murdering a star player.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates a plastic surgeon when an actress's death apparently results from an infection contracted during surgery.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mark and Amanda are assigned to the task force investigating an airplane crash. An adversarial FBI agent and Russian mobsters make their assignment more difficult.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Steve and Ron lead the chase for the stolen nuclear material.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The Sloans run into plenty of industry politics when they investigate the death of television network executive, Rachel Woodrall. Seamy revelations about Woodrall's college sorority lead to the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Jesse finally reunites with his father. After they narrowly elude an assassin, Jesse begins to realize his father isn't the accountant he's always claimed to be, but rather a spy. The Travis's attempt to discover who's sending the killers.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: A dead mime leads to an investigation of a crooked auto dealer. Randy Wolfe, a woman who's apparently an expert at everything, leads the investigation while continually annoying Steve.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A motorcycle stunt driver has a fatal accident while filming an action video. Steve investigates.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: When Steve is shot and falls into a coma, Mark does all in his power to find the assailant, even threatening a suspect with bodily harm.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: This episode takes place four months after Mark was convicted of murder. Steve is slowly recovering from his wounds and Mark is still rotting in prison.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: A hospital emergency preparedness drill turns deadly when an unpopular and ambitious nurse is found dead amid the chaos with an eccentric artist the only witness.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 16
programme.desc: A spat between a girl and her boyfriend leads to an apparent murder, leaving the girl and her mother with a dead body, just as dinner guests Mark and Amanda arrive.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 17
programme.desc: A madman charges into a Lamaze class with a bomb, claiming that a fertility doctor was cheating him. Everything is complicated further when said doctor turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Ratings seeking stunts by TV talk show hosts Darren & Mary have tragic results.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S5 Ep. 19
programme.desc: When a rash of deaths at a high school revolves around one 'helpful' young girl, Dr. Sloan risks his own life to uncover the murderer.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: The All Stars update a 70's disco style using Nine West shoes of their choosing as inspiration!

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Graffiti artists help the designers tag their fabric with spray paint to create wearable art.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: All Stars draw inspiration for their runway designs from images sent to them by USA Today readers.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Nine designers struggle with creating an avant-garde, androgynous look.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: The All Stars create a red carpet gown using only green, eco-friendly fabrics and materials.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: The Unconventional Materials Challenge brings the designers to a Christmas decor emporium.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: The final six All Stars are tasked with designing a look for one of three vintage 1920's events.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: All Stars must create a ready-to-wear look with a "wow factor," while also meeting a retail budget.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: The four remaining designers are paired with four female veterans from different military branches.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: Designers retire sketching at 1407 for a day of sketching in Paris at the Eiffel Tower!

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: The final three duke it out and give it all they've got to prove who Project Runway's All Star is.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Zanna Roberts Rassi introduces everyone to 16 new designers on Project Runway Season 11.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Designers are placed in 2 teams of 8 and told they will be designing in teams for the entire season.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The two teams are tasked with designing new uniforms for the popular nightclub/ping pong club Spin.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The teams are presented with the challenge of designing a look for Heidi to wear in her ad campaign.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The flower store and the hardware store challenges are combined for a “hard and soft” challenge.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are asked to work in pairs to make two looks for country music star Miranda Lambert.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers must work in teams of two to create looks for “mature” women.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In teams of two, the designers are tasked with making a prom dress out of duct tape.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Regrouping once again, the judges decide which designers they would like to see work together.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers make a ready-to-wear look for Lord and Taylor, inspired by their famous rose design.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In pairs again, the designers crate two looks: one avant-garde and a second ready-to-wear piece.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are relieved when they receive the news that they will now be working on their own.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The remaining designers are paired with new assistants and each sent to a European fashion capital.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The few designers left return to their hometowns to begin working on their final collections.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Designers present their final collections at Mercedes Benz Fashion Week and a winner is named.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Designers meet one more time to talk about their experiences while on Project Runway Season 11.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A look at never-before-seen footage of the cycle 11 contestants that includes the ladies improvising a rap in the hot tub, one girl revealing a hidden talent and a very candid chat between Tyra and the model wannabes.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The ladies pull a disappearing act for this week’s challenge.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The ladies pack their bags and head overseas to their European destination.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The remaining five girls travel around town by boat for their go sees.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Paulina offers the girls advice on how to successfully model with a variety of items, including fish and toilet paper.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In the cycle 11 finale, the three finalists put their Top Model experience to the test when they shoot their final CoverGirl commercial & print ad.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: 32 young women arrive in LA, only to be whittled down to 13 finalists. After the field was narrowed down to 13 finalists, the girls were sent to their first photoshoot with Nigel Barker as their photographer.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Greeted by Miss J and a high school marching band, the girls were divided into teams and taught a runway walking routine based on timing and precision.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The girls were greeted at Salon Sessions Studio by Tyra, Jay and Miss J for their dramatic makeovers.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: After being pulled over by what they thought was a traffic cop, the girls were taught the art of posing by vogue instructor Benny Ninja.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The girls met with the director of Elite Model Management Cathy Gould and Elite Model Claudia Mason, who taught them all about personal style and how to dress appropriately.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The girls were greeted by Twiggy and ANTM: Cycle Seven participant Melrose who taught them the importance of having a memorable name.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The girls met with actress Tia Mowry (The Game) who taught them how to portray different characters through voice and movement.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The girls were greeted at their house by Cycle 2 participant April, who gave them advice on how to be a correspondent and conduct a good interview.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In this special recap episode, never-before-seen footage about the journey of the five remaining contestants is revealed, including a heated argument between two girls and a staged mock elimination by all the girls.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The girls met with the owner of Priscilla's Model Management, Priscilla Leighton Clark, and Australian model Jodhi Meares, who organized and booked several designers to meet them on Go Sees.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The girls met with Aboriginal Elder Uncle Max and his niece Calita, who taught them about the native Australian art of storytelling through dance.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The three remaining models participated in a national photoshoot for Cover Girl's Lipshine Lip Color and a My Life as a CoverGirl commercial.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The 32 hopeful contestants arrived in a Pasadena hotel to start a runway challenge. Tyra selected the 13 finalists to enter the competition.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After the models battle it out to make the final cut, they are shocked to learn they will be going bald.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After the girls are transformed with makeovers, they are put on ice at a photoshoot and face an ice princess back at the house.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Creepy cockroaches and falling fairy tales test the competitors' limits on the catwalk and in their photoshoot.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The models experience a time for all seasons in a photoshoot after getting tips from supermodel Janice Dickinson

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The models' improvisational skills are tested in a Covergirl commercial, and one lucky girl wins a guest-starring role on Veronica Mars.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: One model shocks everyone when she loses her temper with another competitor; and at a photoshoot, the girls must model shoes while krumping.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: One model faces a surgical procedure, and the models pose in a black and white photo directed by Tyra Banks.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Food is the only thing on the minds of the castaways as one member from each camp faces a painful moral dilemma which could have dramatic ramifications for the tribemates & their own game.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tensions run high as the castaways endure further wind & rain without fire & shelter before a lengthy immunity challenge finishing with the next Tribal Council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Blatant lies at the last tribal council has put everyone in one camp on edge. Will they be able to put their differences aside to win the reward challenge or will they leave hungry?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A brutal tribal council the night before has left one castaway on the war path seeking retribution. At the immunity challenge the tribes must take part in a physical Sumo'an contest.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: As both tribes appear to reach their wits' end, the prospect of a luxurious and cleansing reward could be enough to keep the castaways in the game for weeks to come.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Winning immunity has never been so vital to resettling the balance within each tribe, and with a highly competitive challenge that encourages fair contact, things are sure to get feisty.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Social divisions begin to exhaust castaways as one tribe breaks down ahead of the next immunity challenge. Will they be able to come together to avoid another visit to tribal council?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Aligned castaways find themselves at each other's throats over who is doing enough work around camp, but is one player acting lazy to divide the tribe?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A surprise challenge sees one castaway return to camp with an unexpected power that could push tensions to breaking point. Later, will one castaway past come back to haunt them at tribal council?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Alliances continue to flip as a former power player finds themselves at the bottom of their tribe and a last minute scramble to return to their former glory will turn friend against friend.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Betrayal runs rampant within both tribes as deceptive immunity clues and relentless strategising begins to place targets on the backs of castaways who had previously flown under the radar.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: The fallout from one of the most dramatic Tribal Councils this season sends shockwaves through one tribe as castaways scramble to repair broken bonds.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Change is in the air as time comes for the biggest event in the game so far, a merger. Emotions continue to run high when a particularly difficult reward challenge offers a deeply sentimental prize.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: The fallout from the first group Tribal Council tears a rift between the newly formed tribe, resulting in a huge clash of alliances. Who will be the next contestant to have their flame extinguished?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: A shock display of power at the last Tribal Council places an immediate target on one castaway. Will the new shift in camp dynamics be enough to remove a prolific player from the game?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A scheming conversation is overheard putting one contestant in the firing line and an alliance is shattered resulting in one of the most divided Tribal Councils this series.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Another alliance is in jeopardy as one contestant decides to flip on a fellow tribesman, planning the biggest blindside this season, but an unexpected turn of events forces the castaway to reconsider.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 21
programme.desc: The battle for individual immunity is at an all-time high and contestants must compete in a fast-paced memory challenge to secure their safety for another day going into Tribal Council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 22
programme.desc: With alliances crumbling and paranoia setting in all six castaways are determined to win individual immunity. In an explosive Tribal Council, one contestant holds the power but who will they choose?
