programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mario turns to his dad for some relationship advice as Lucy sheds tears. Jess and Gemma tap into their spiritual side. Lauren Pope spills the beans on a past royal relationship. Joey holds a poker night for Mick, Diags, Gemma, Mario, Chloe and Frankie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey and Diags attempt to cheer up Arg with a surprise outing, roller-skating in the park. Gemma celebrates her 31st birthday in true Essex style with a Hollywood themed party.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Joey and Diags persuade Lauren Pope and Georgina to go on a night out, Joey and Diags-style. Diags gets a crash course in personal grooming from the best in the business, Chloe Sims and she reveals her secret weapon in battling acne, nappy rash cream.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Chloe has her first ever bikini wax in preparation for Sam’s hot tub party. Sam’s hot tub gets lots of action in her at her housewarming party. Mick takes Arg, Mario, Joey and Diags to his beach-side caravan for a boys night away and some sea air.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lydia and Arg’s relationship takes another unexpected turn. Billi and Cara hold an EsSex and the City themed Valentines Day party. Billi bags herself a Valentines kiss.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mario’s stream of surprises for Lucy continues as he proves the way to an Essex girl’s heart is through a tiny dog. Sam and Billie show Gemma the latest solution for a camel-toe.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Nanny Brighton comes to stay in a bid to help brighten Arg’s spirits. Chloe, Lauren Pope and Georgina toss some Essex style Pancakes. Best Friends Cara and Billi have an awkward chat about Billi’s feelings for Tom.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Joey, Diags, Arg and Frankie have an action-packed afternoon rope swinging and grass sledding. Lauren Pope recovers from her breast implant operation and Dr. Russo pays her a bedside visit. Gemma has a first date with a new mystery man.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It’s the series finale. Mario throws a fancy dress party to celebrate his birthday. Joey and Ricky sort out their differences. Jess and Lauren come face to face at Mario’s party. With a choice of girls, which one will Ricky chose?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Essex gang are in shock as Arg shows off his new skinny look in preparation for the London Marathon. Gemma is faced with more worries about Charlie when she realises there is no passion between the pair.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey’s Reem night relaunches with a bang. Cara and Mick spend the day together- on segways. Gemma tells all about her titanic date with Charlie. Arg trains for the marathon.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With less than a week to go before the marathon, Arg, Billi and Cara continue their training, with the help of Ricardo. Mario and Ricky rib Little Chris over his failed attempt at chatting up Frankie. Gemma has a clothing line launch.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: We follow the progress of Arg, Billi and Cara in the London Marathon. Bobby gets plastic surgery advice from Chloe and Lauren P. Charlie and Gemma have a heart to heart after Gemma was uncovered as Ricky’s mystery texter.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Billi, Cara and Arg recover after completing the London marathon. Chloe and the girls take her daughter to the farm for her birthday. Lucy and Mario celebrate their one year anniversary.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It’s Mick’s birthday and he’s throwing a party Vegas Style – everyone is going. Sam, Billie, Gemma and Lucy try out Pole Dancing. Mario takes Little Chris to get his chest waxed.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Sam throws a dinner party for all of the ‘couples’. We meet Gemma’s new mystery man Rami. Tom P and Lauren P go on a date to a vineyard- will he do enough to impress her?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: There’s a new girl on the block. The girl Tom K has been texting is revealed and there are a few unhappy campers. We find out the goss after Lauren P’s and Tom P’s snog. Joey’s in trouble with Sam. Nanny Pat gets new dentures.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Joey thinks he might have made a mistake by dumping Sam, but is it too late? Lucy does a photoshoot for her new swimwear range. It’s the launch night of Bobby’s brand new hairdressing Academy. The tension simmers between Gemma and her ex Charlie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The rivalry between the boys escalates and Diags is determined to confront Mario. Lauren comes face-to-face with Tom P questioning him over his decision to choose Lauren P over her. Gemma apologizes to Bobby for ruining his open night.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Lucy and Mario host their engagement party, but who will be invited? Joey and Sam go on a double date with Essex’s newest couple, Arg and Gemma. Little Chris makes Mario an engagement present, but will he be his best man?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mick and Debbie host a glam Essex Sports Day including a three-legged couple race. There is a new romance on the cards for Lauren G. Jess finds herself stuck in the middle of Lucy and Mario and Sam and Joey.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey celebrates his Birthday with an 80’s themed party. Lauren P and Lauren G come face to face for the first time since Lauren G started seeing Tom P. Gemma gets stuck in the middle of a row between boyfriend Arg, and his former girlfriend, Lydia.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tom P takes Lauren Goodger to the cinema, for their first date. Jess gives Ricky an ultimatum. Arg turns up on Gemma’s doorstep with a surprise, but will she like it?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Bobby confides in best friend Lydia that he thinks he's fallen in love with Charlie; Sam and Lucy agree to meet and make up over the cheating accusations against Mario.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Everyone heads out to celebrate Charlie's birthday; sensing something is wrong with Bobby, Charlie tries to comfort his best friend although Bobby drops a bombshell. Jamie Reed makes quite an impression on a few of the ladies.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arg bumps into Jamie, but how will he react? Mario talks to Tom P about texting Jess. Sam hosts a BBQ, but who will turn up?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jess hosts a showcase for her new single. Sam and Joey have a tennis lesson, but who will come out on top? New boy Jamie continues to ruffle feathers.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Lauren Goodger has her doubts about Tom P. Arg takes Gemma for a surprise singing lesson. Bobby celebrates his birthday with a trip to Southend and a gay night out.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lucy throws a prom for her 21st Birthday. One of the couples gets voted prom King and Queen. Jamie apologizes to Frankie, but will it be accepted?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Gemma is sick of Arg. Charlie wants to progress things with Danni. Joey and Sam seek divine intervention.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey and Arg have an accident. Charlie gets a talking to. Lauren P bumps into an old friend.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Debbie makes her feelings known to Tom K. The girls get sporty. Arg and Tom fallout. Charlie has a few words with Danni and Bobby confronts Danni.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Lucy lays her cards on the table. Mario seeks some advice from his brother in law. Lydia sets the record straight. and the boys launch a full scale operation to retrieve what is rightfully Arg’s!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S2 Ep. 250
programme.desc: The Reunion brings the cast and their friends & families together to find out what really went down during series 2. Host Russell Kane will rummage through the tensions, passions, laughter and tears.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: It's time to swap the grey river Tyne for the crystal blue waters of Cancun, Mexico for the carnage of Spring break! Vicky and Ricci are loved up, whilst Jay is missing the love of his life. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: With the house reduced to carnage and Sophie losing even more faith in boyfriend Joel, there are still plenty of beaches to party on. Meanwhile Holly ups her game in the pursuit of James. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Sophie is elated as Joel surprises her with a visit. But will he be able to behave himself? And with everyone fearing that his worldie mission may now be over, Holly moves in on her prey. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: The chaos in Cancun continues as Gaz celebrates his birthday in true Geordie style. Charlotte takes her holiday romance to the next level. Vicky erupts as Cancun Chris gets sweet revenge. (S3, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Vicky and Ricci return to the house in time for Becca's birthday which goes off in usual Geordie style. Sophie sends Joel back to England, but it's not long before she regrets the decision. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: An unexpected call means James has to choose between his best mates and Holly. Gary has another threesome and a night out trying to forget about Gary ends in disaster for Charlotte. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: The boy-girl divide returns! Charlotte and Gaz aren't speaking, Becca and Jay are continually arguing, while Holly and James' nurse-patient relationship is back to strictly professional. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: It's the final few days of spring break and the house is rocked by the loss of yet another member. In the last hours, to the disbelief of everyone, Ricci plans his proposal to Vicky. (S3, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 401
programme.desc: After a fun filled summer in Cancun the Geordie Shore gang are back with a bang! With two new spaces in the house, it can only mean one thing, fresh meat for the family!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 402
programme.desc: The gang throw Ricci and Vicky an engagement party to remember. There'll be booze and banter aplenty, but it turns into a night that everyone will remember for all the wrong reasons.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 403
programme.desc: With Ricci and Sophie having been asked to leave the house, the rest of the Geordie Shore gang decide a road trip to Liverpool is in order to check out the clubs and talent.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: The Geordie Shore house is a far from happy place with Vicky and Sophie still not talking and the rest of the house caught in the divide... it's stormy seas ahead at the Shore.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 405
programme.desc: Peace has finally been restored in the house now that Vicky and Sophie have made up, but nothing lasts forever and when Ricci sees red on a family night out, disaster strikes.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: It's James' birthday and the gang plan a surprise trip to Dublin to celebrate with a secret guest, but on their return their high is brought down by Ricci's return with some bad news.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: With Ricci gone from the Geordie Shore house, the rest of the gang are determined to keep Vicky's spirits up and the boys decide that what better way than a walk on the wild side - camping!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 408
programme.desc: It's all coming to an end in the house with some keener to leave than others. Before they pack their bags, there's time for a big bash, Geordie style, and it seems like love is all around.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 501
programme.desc: The Geordie Shore gang are back in a pimped up pad and ready to cause chaos once again. (S5, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 502
programme.desc: The gang return from Amsterdam and it's time to tear Newcastle a new one. Vicky and Ricci celebrate breaking the Geordie Shore relationship curse and the gang try out speed dating. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 503
programme.desc: There's tension in the Toon, as James brings girlfriend Kate on a night out, leaving Holly unimpressed. The Geordie Shore house explodes as Vicky and Ricci have a row to remember. (S5, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: The Geordie Tour of Europe is back on as the gang are off to Prague for banter, birds, & booze. The girls get their guns out at the shooting range whilst the boys visit the local strip clubs (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 505
programme.desc: The gang return from Prague to a turbulent Toon. The house is in total meltdown as Charlotte and Gary finally come to blows, and it looks like it could be the end for Vicky and Ricci (S5, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: Charlotte returns to the Geordie Shore house just in time to join the rest of the gang on a Geordie Tour of Barcelona. Our favourite Geordies bathe in the Spanish sun, sea, sex and sangria.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 507
programme.desc: The gang return from Barcelona with Charlotte's declaration of love for Gary still hanging in the air and Vicky set for a final showdown with Ricci (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: With the gang cooling off after the biggest fight in the show's history, there's an icy atmosphere between the boys and the girls as they're off to the Alps for their final Geordie Tour (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 601
programme.desc: Holly and James still haven't put their differences behind them and are a war zone waiting to happen, Gary and Scott are on a mission to pull every girl in Sydney. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 602
programme.desc: The group are in high spirits as they get a surprise visit from Jay. Charlotte is still coming to terms with her feelings for Gaz. James' battle with Holly is set to continue. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 603
programme.desc: James and Gaz come to blows over pulling and Gaz is forced to leave the house. Vicky tashes on and Holly gets up close and personal with the one and only Scotty T. (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Jason kisses Jessica and gets busted by LC. Look out!

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: LC throws another party and after his moronic actions at the benefit. Jason comes crawling back to apologize, but he can't even do that well.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: It's the end of the summer, and the time has come for everybody to leave beautiful Laguna Beach. The cast must come to terms with where their lives will go from here.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It is a new year with a new cast and the drama starts right away in Laguna Beach. Tessa is invited to queen bee Kyndra's BBQ, but when Tessa brings her best friend Raquel, it's clear they are both unwanted guests.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Rocky throws Tessa a surprise birthday party but it's Chase who delivers Tessa the best present. Meanwhile, the Kyndra/Cameron relationship heats up behind Jessica's back.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Christmas in Laguna heats up when Kyndra and Cami crash Rocky's holiday party. Meanwhile, Cameron gets defensive about his relationship with Jessica.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Breanna reaches out to her former best friend Raquel in hopes to repair their relationship, but things don't go smoothly. Meanwhile, Chase arranges for a double date so his pal Kelan can go after his long-time crush, Lexie.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When Tessa and Rocky travel to San Diego for a modeling gig for Tessa, Cameron decides to tag along. Sparks fly between him and Tessa, but will Jessica find out?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It's Cameron's birthday but it's Tessa who is surprised when she realizes that Cameron has a totally different take on their hookup. Meanwhile, Kyndra rekindles her rocky romance with her ex-boyfriend, Tyler.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Kyndra risks her relationship with Tyler when she gets a little too cozy with Cameron at Winter Formal. Will she be able to convince everyone nothing happened including Tyler's little sister, Nikki, before she tells?

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Kyndra tries to calm the rumor mill by hosting a Valentine's Day dinner party with Tyler, but tensions flare when Cameron shows up. Meanwhile, Rocky takes it to another level with Alex on their romantic night out.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Tessa goes on a date with Derek, one of the popular guys, while Cameron and Jessica's relationship is on its last legs.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Things get heated at the bonfire when Alex and Rocky determine the fate of their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Alex and Rocky have broken up, but rough times are still ahead, plus Tessa tries to get Derek to open up about their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The entire crew from Laguna heads down to Cabo San Lucas for spring break; whatever happens in Cabo, stays in Cabo.

programme.title: Laguna Beach S3 Ep. 13

Hate however, is loves gloomy shadow, and it too can drive women into the darkness of their minds where a callous plot to kill is hatched. These Deadly Women, once a vision in white, become their husbands blackest hour when murder is their escape from an ‘Inconvenient Marriage’.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 5

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 4

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 7

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 3

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 2

Their rivalry intensifies when the Royal Prince of Samavia rolls into town looking for a royal baker for his brother’s coronation. When Allie and the Royal Prince hit it off, it seems he might be in the market for more than just a terrific cake. But will the sneaky Marilyn let Allie get it all: the gig and the prince? Of course not.

programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A novelist falls in love with a retired Navy SEAL while writing her newest book.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Arnold's pet pig, Abner, escapes one night while Arnold is sleeping. /Grandpa entrusts Arnold with the job of fetching his prized pocket watch from the repair shop.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When L.O.S.E.R.S. Attack: Timmy’s enemies join forces and form the League Of Super Evil Revenge Seekers – L.O.S.E.R.S., for short - in order to annihilate him.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 67
programme.desc: Big Bob gets a parrot which eventually gets on his nerves. He passes the bird on to Helga, who spills her emotions about Arnold to the bird. Arnold and Gerald decide to sell chocolate turtles to raise money for the club's ongoing go-cart project.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Norb gets a train set for Arbor Day and Dag only gets an air freshener, Dag's jealousy gets the better of him.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 74
programme.desc: After eating pork rinds, Helga begins to sleepwalk and ends up walking to Arnold's house. The Fighting Families Contest has come to town and has selected two families.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When a movie lets out later than expected, Arnold and the gang have no choice but to take the subway home./Arnold and the gang set out on a quest to find the hidden treasure of the mysterious "Wheezin' Ed" on Elk Island.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Shore Shack earns the gang enough in tips to finance their entry in the New Zealand Junior Waikikamukau Games. The games feature four extreme competitions for teams.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Norb secretly props up Dag's secret super hero identity until he gets in a tight jam and then it's Muscular Beavers To The Rescue!'.'

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 57
programme.desc: Girl Trouble/School Dance: Arnold tells Grandpa he''s tired of dealing with Helga''s nonsense. Grandpa tells Arnold a story about a girl he had to deal with when he was a kid who treated him the same way. She turns out to be Grandma.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Helga's older sister, Olga, comes home from college -- much to Helga's displeasure -- and quickly garners all of her parents' attention. /Arnold and Gerald have been saving up cereal box tops to get a telescope before the arrival of Salley's Comet.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 79
programme.desc: Washed up balladeer Dino Spumoni fakes his own death in order to increase his record sales. Everyone believes he's dead and at the funeral, Grandpa and Arnold find out that Dino has left Arnold all his future record sales.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do by his parents, Timmy wishes that he would have to do the opposite of whatever his parents told him. Timmy wishes he was a teenager to ride the cool new ride at the amusement park.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The Big Fairy Share Scare: Timmy finds out that he has to share his fairies with the new girl in school, Chloe Carmichael. But when Chloe realizes she can use her magic for good, she wishes everyone in Dimmsdale would share everything, and chaos ensues.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 34
programme.desc: Freeze Frame/Phoebe Cheats: Arnold and Gerald catch a suspicious man on film and they follow him clue-to-clue.In an effort to win a class poetry contest, Phoebe copies a poem from a book.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 46
programme.desc: Arnold accidentally breaks a promise he made to Iggy and must deal with the consequences. / Big Bob hires a nanny for Helga. Helga fights the nanny at her own game and forces her to leave.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: When the news comes to Madtown to show the new Blader Bowl Otto decides it's his chance to make it to the big time.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chicken Poofs/Stupid Cupid: Poof gets the "Chicken Poofs" and turns everyone into actual chickens! Timmy steals Cupid's arrows in an attempt to make Trixie fall in love with him and go to the school "Romance Dance."

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Play Date... of Doom/Teacher's Pet: Foop is back! He’s escaped from prison and convinced Cosmo and Wanda he’s ready for a playdate with Poof. But he’s really there to try and destroy his arch enemy again, and it’s up to Timmy and Poof to thwart his plan.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 51
programme.desc: Phoebe Takes the Fall/The Pig War: Phoebe agrees to take a dive so that Helga can win a competition./The boys engage in a recreation of a historical battle, only this time their prized pig is in danger of losing his life.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 75
programme.desc: After being saved from thugs by a mysterious, caped character named Monkeyman, Arnold tells the gang about it. Out on a field trip, Harold and Helga miss the bus and get separated from the rest of the class.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mugged/Roughin' It: Arnold learns the secrets of the martial arts from Grandma after getting held up for his bus pass. /Grandpa takes Arnold and Gerald out to the woods to show them how to camp "the old fashioned way."

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Weirdos on a Train/Tons of Timmys: Dad and Crocker make a deal. As a result, Crocker becomes best friends with Dinkleberg. Timmy wishes up 5000 Timmys for the Planet of the Dads. The Timmys kidnap Cosmo and Wanda.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Booby Trapped: Cosmo and Wanda spend the night at Chloe’s, disguised as Flightless Booby Birds. But when Chloe’s parents decide to return the boobies to their natural habitat in the rainforest, Timmy and Chloe have to go and save them.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Man's Worst Friend: In order to make Timmy and his family miserable, Foop replaces Sparky with the Anti-Sparky. When that plan works, Foop decides to make all of Dimmsdale unhappy by replacing everyone's pet with an evil pet.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Blue Angel/Marked Man: Chloe’s goodness is draining the Anti-Fairy World Wand. Foop disguises himself as a girl to try and break Chloe. Timmy takes Chloe to meet Mark Chang to prove to her that aliens really do exist.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Daggett and Norbert vie for their baby sister's affection when the two girls are left in their care for the weekend.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Tired of Mom’s terrible dinners, Timmy wishes Mom were the best chef in the world.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 24
programme.desc: The Fairy Beginning: When Jorgen discovers that Cosmo never graduated from the Fairy Academy, he threatens to take away his job as Fairy Godparent. To solve the mystery of what happened, the gang looks through Cosmo’s memories of his teenage years.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Dag attempts to make Norb's dreams come true when Norb confesses his silly dream to become a Liepezoner Stallion.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 38
programme.desc: Save the Tree/New Teacher: After the kids find out that Big Bob is planning on cutting down "Mighty Pete," the oldest tree in the neighborhood, Arnold organizes a campaign to save the tree.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S7 Ep. 8
programme.desc: One Man Banned/Frenemy Mine: After Timmy’s rejected from the school band, he wishes everyone would love his music./Timmy saves Vicky from a horrible accident and suddenly she is stricken by his generosity.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Arnold and Gerald both get jobs working for Mrs. Vitello in her flower shop. /Arnold designs a fantastic float for the City Day Parade, but the school has no money to build it.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 55
programme.desc: Arnold and Lila/Grand Prix: Helga, lost in a love reverie, writes "Arnold loves Helga" on a wall, but changes the name to "Lila" when the kids approach. Lila thinks that Arnold loves her until he explains the mistake.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Love at First Bark/Desperate Without Housewives: Dad forbids Sparky from dating Dinkleberg’s new dog. Timmy wishes Dad would like the dog as much as Sparky. When Mom won’t stop nagging Timmy and Dad, Timmy wishes all women away for one day.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Dog Gone/Turner Back Time: Dad refuses to sell Sparky to his boss so he makes Dad’s life miserable at work. Timmy and Sparky hatch a plan. Timmy wishes his ancestors had picked different careers. Timmy’s family becomes rich and spoiled.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Timmy goes on an adventure to search for his fairies and a magical wand that will defeat the Darkness.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 61
programme.desc: Timmy is sick of all of these veggies so he decides to change all of the healthy food into desserts! Timmy makes magic You Doo dolls to control everyone he knows.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Knitwits/Dimmsdale’s Got Talent?: Dad takes Mom on what he thinks is a knight-themed cruise to renew their vows, but it’s really a knitting cruise. Mr. Bickels hosts a talent show and everyone gets in, but Timmy.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Invasion of the Dads: Timmy’s previous wish for a Planet of Dads backfires when the Dads realize the one thing missing from their lives is Mom, and they come to steal her away from Dad and Timmy!

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: When pop star Kayla Batch hires The Game Shakers to make a lifestyle game, she invites Babe to join her elite squad while Kenzie is left on the outs.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The most popular kid in school is throwing what may be the greatest sixteenth party ever, but Drake and Josh may be having cake for two after they get banned from the party.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 216
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie are suspicious of Trip's new fame-hungry girlfriend and are determined to find out if she's using him to get closer to Double G.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 212
programme.desc: After the Game Shakers sign up for the restroom-sharing app Air TnP, one of their customers sabotages their new game with a virus, and the kids have to figure out a way to undo the damage.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 120
programme.desc: The Game Shakers visit a mummy exhibit. Hudson accidentally snaps off one of its fingers. Babe leads a quest to glue it back on without getting caught.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The guys are excited to head back to Minnesota for the holidays, but Gustavo’s got them working on a Christmas EP, and won’t let them go home until it’s done.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: Trip becomes depressed after losing a big video game battle to a 7-year-old.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 28
programme.desc: The boys have the fight of all fights and decide to move out. James ends up squatting in a cool retiree’s apartment, Logan moves into a place right by the water, Carlos builds a cardboard house, and Kendall must fix things.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Jordin Sparks is staying at the Palm Woods while she records a new song with Gustavo. The guys are told to stay away from her because they are bad luck...

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Jo’s publicist wants the press to think she’s dating her new co-star, so Kendall and Jo must sneak around and hide their relationship!

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It’s time again for the prank war at the Palm Woods, and this time it's kids versus adults as they battle for the honor of winning Lord Prankington’s Cup.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mrs. Hayfer needs a house sitter and it's the boys to the rescue, but all doesn't go according to plan when they meet Tiberius, a vicious dog with an appetite for..Drake & Josh?!

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The guys are not thrilled with their boring apartment at the Palm Woods and hatch a plan to improve it when Gustavo creates a fun 'fake' living area for them on a soundstage for an upcoming EPK shoot.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The boys are scheduled to make their first TV appearance, but when it looks like BTR will be bumped from the line-up, they do whatever it takes to make their debut happen.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lucy releases her revenge album about Kendall and it becomes a huge hit! James, desperate for attention, creates a rumor that he and Cher Lloyd are recording a duet, and Carlos gets bad press after he appears to hit an old lady.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Drake decides that he and Josh are going to be the first to ride the Demonator, the fastest and scariest rollercoaster opening tomorrow at Mystic Mountain.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: When a crime show decides to film reenactments at the Premiere, fantasy and reality collide as Josh uproariously finds himself cast as the lead. San Diego's most wanted Movie Bandit!

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Drake wins a free skydive off a helicopter and goes off to do it despite his parents saying no. Josh, being the good brother he is, tries to stop him, but ends up going along for the ride.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 220
programme.desc: A failed hacking attempt and blackmail put the Game Shakers' big deal with Clam Jumper in jeopardy.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The record company CEO thinks adding a fifth band member will broaden Big Time Rush’s appeal and sticks the guys with a self-proclaimed 'bad boy', who tries to inject dissension and tension within the group.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Drake and Josh are left in charge for the weekend and quickly exhaust their funds and turn the house into a bed and breakfast as a source of income.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A six-year-old argument between Drake and Josh is suddenly rekindled when their conflicting accounts of a incident at a San Diego Padres game finds them each placing the blame on the other.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The guys are visited by their hometown friend who happens to be an awesome singer, but also the world’s biggest klutz! At the same time, James is visited by a fan whose behavior quickly turns from complimentary to stalker.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Coming to terms with how their world has changed, the guys decide to take control and with Gustavo plan their first big concert.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: In our season finale, Drake and Josh go on the Dr. Phyliss Show and relive some of their most outlandish moments. Some will jab at your funny bone, while others will tug on your heart strings.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: Lost Jacket, Falling Pigeons: When Dub gives the girls bonuses for Sky Whale's success, Babe buys herself a fancy new jacket. But she is crushed when she loses it. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 118
programme.desc: Shark Explosion: Triple G's mom Jackie invites the kids on her yacht. But she and Double G have doubled booked the yacht, causing the pair to compete for the kids' affection. (S1, ep 18)

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: James' mom, nicknamed the "Estee Lauder of the Midwest" for her successful cosmetics line, arrives at the Palm Woods to bring James home and groom him to take over the family company.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It's Aunt Catherine's wedding day, and Drake and Josh are in charge of picking up the cake. But their wedding plans get crashed when their car breaks down.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: After Bellview High nerd, Eric Blonnowitz accidentally punches Drake he finds a newfound world of fame, popularity and girls.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After Drake agrees to help Josh with his girl troubles, Josh finds himself promising to play a birthday song at his crush's party.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 25
programme.desc: While Gustavo struggles to write the band's next hit song, the guys try to cheer up Kendall, who is heartbroken after his break-up with Jo.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Lucy, an 18-year-old rocker chick moves into the Palm Woods and she immediately blows the BTR guys away by how cool she is. Carlos and James are desperate to date Lucy, while Kendall tries to prove that BTR can rock too.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 116
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie are nominated for a Girl Power Award. Kenzie soon realises the award show is a scam, but Babe is determined to win her first trophy ever.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie work to convince Double G to partner with them in their new venture while Triple G works to convince the girls to let him join the team.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Blessed with his unconventional dance moves, Josh decides to try out for the local dance contest.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Kendall and Lucy are about to have their first kiss when her good looking ex-boyfriend Beau shows up to win her back. Griffin recruits Logan and Carlos to help him prepare for corporate espionage.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 114
programme.desc: When the kids discover a hacker has put their new game Nasty Goats on an illegal website, they track him down in Alaska. With the help of Double G, they strike a deal.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: Dub's recently announced bid for mayor gets off to a rocky start after he snubs a newborn, so the Game Shakers step up to help him get over his fear of babies and end "Babygate" once and for all.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Drake has taken advantage of Josh for the last time and Josh decides that he is done dealing with Drake.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: James' fairy tale romance with a foreign princess quickly becomes an escape mission after he inadvertently proposes marriage, and the guys have to free him before he's forced into a royal wedding.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: The Game Shakers take the subway to a boxing game pitch, but forget the gloves and send Trip and Hudson back for them. Dub goes to save Trip from the subway.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Drake bets that he can last longer without junk food than Josh can without video games. Who will win.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It's BTR's final stop on their world tour and we go behind the scenes and see all the craziness that happens backstage. Mixing in real concert footage, we see the guys prepare for the show and deal with backstage drama.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Big Time Dreams Pt. 1: It’s the Tween Choice Awards, and BTR is nominated and booked to close the show! However, their night is in jeopardy when the guys uncover an evil plan to brainwash the audience.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 211
programme.desc: To settle a dispute over who Freddie liked better in iCarly - Carly or Sam - the Game Shakers track down Nathan Kress himself and try to get the answer out of him by any means necessary.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Fueled by a love of the opposite sex and fear of commitment, Drake breaks up with his girlfriend only to realize that he may have made the wrong decision.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The guys are continuing to live their Hollywood dream, however James, Logan & Carlos begin showing odd behavior.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: After learning that the exact same game idea they're about to pitch to a client was already released by another company, the Game Shakers have twenty minutes to think up a new game.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: When Gustavo announces that the boys get to make their first music video, they go overboard and over promise roles to all the kids at the Palm Woods.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Drake takes advantage of Josh's billiard skills by hustling local kids and swindling them out of their money.
